flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Manchester Community College rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.1k → $15.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Manchester Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Manchester Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Manchester Community College rose 30% between 2006 and 2009 (24.7% → 32.3%).
